taskId: 20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题
message: 已完成设计分析，未修改生产代码。 ## Artifacts produced - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/prd.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/design.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/implement.md` - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/checks.md` ## Key findings 1. **设计确认问题根因**：`awaiting_approval -> implementing` 目前只要求 `reason`，且 `override` 可绕过；没有与“后续用户明确批准”绑定的硬凭证，所以模型可在同一轮直接越过确认。 2. **面板刷新问题根因**：`YpiStudioPanel` 首次加载所有 tab；`AppShell` 工作中轮询传入 `refreshKey`，面板每次把 task 状态设为 `loading`，导致已有内容被 loading 替换。 3. **浮窗不实时问题根因**：task 绑定可能落到 `pi_process_*`，session-widget 解析故意忽略它；同时前端在 `ypi_studio_task` create result 后没有即时重查，浮窗只能等 agent end/轮询/刷新。 ## Recommended minimal fix - 代码硬门禁：新增 approval gate/grant；无后续用户批准 grant 时禁止 `awaiting_approval -> implementing`，`override` 也不能绕过。 - Prompt/流程：设计完成后只允许转 `awaiting_approval` 并停止本轮，等待用户确认。 - UI/API 同步：稳定 context key 优先使用 `pi_<sessionId>`；Studio task create/bind 事件后即时去抖重查 …

taskId: 20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题
message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — added approval gate/grant metadata types. - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — hard-gated `awaiting_approval -> implementing`; records gate/grant; `override` cannot bypass. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — stable `pi_<sessionId>` context priority; records explicit user approval on input; strengthened prompts/guidelines. - `components/AppShell.tsx` — debounced Studio task recheck from tool results; throttled polling; panel refresh only while open. - `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — Studio progress signature now includes task id/key/status. - `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx` — current-tab-first loading, lazy/background refresh, preserves old task content. - `docs/architecture/overview.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `docs/modules/library.md` — updated behavior docs. - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/handoff.md` — handoff artifact produced. #### Verification - `npm run lint` — passed. - `node…

message: Handoff: - Changed: - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — fixed approval-text false positives for negated English phrases. - `lib/ypi-studio-extension.ts` — fixed prompt injection so a recorded approval grant in the current session allows the next turn to proceed to `implementing`. - Artifact: - `.ypi/tasks/20260702-182153-修复-ypi-studio-设计确认-面板刷新与任务浮窗同步问题/review.md` Validation: - `npm run lint` — passed - `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed - approval regex spot-check — passed Remaining risks: - No browser E2E run yet; panel refresh behavior and widget realtime appearance were code-reviewed, but should still be manually checked per `checks.md`. Decision needed from main session: - None blocking. - Recommended: run the manual acceptance flow once before closing the task.
